title: A&O Shearman elevates NLSIU grad Bhishaan Shah to Partnership
description: A&O Shearman has elevated Bhishaan Shah to Partnership, alongside 32 other lawyers.Shah is a 2012 alumnus of National Law School of India University.He has been associated with A&O Shearman and legacy firm Allen & Overy for a cumulative 13 years. Operating out of the firm's London office, Shah specialises in M&A. He advises corporates and financial institutions worldwide on private acquisitions and disposals, joint ventures, and public takeovers.If you would like your Deals, Colu
